_instructions: Paste this config into Vapi Dashboard → Assistants → Create → JSON tab. Fill in YOUR values where marked with <REPLACE>.
name: Priya — MTA Voice Agent

messages.content: <REPLACE: paste the full output of buildSystemPrompt() from src/prompts/priya.prompt.ts>

voice.voiceId: <REPLACE: go to elevenlabs.io/voice-library → search 'Indian female multilingual' → copy Voice ID>

firstMessage: Namaste! Main Priya hoon, Manglam Technical Agency se. Aap kaise help kar sakti hoon aapki?
endCallMessage: Bahut shukriya call karne ke liye! Hamari team jald hi aapse contact karegi. Namaste!

analysisPlan.summaryPrompt: Summarize this call in 2-3 sentences. Include: (1) the caller's name and business, (2) what service they need, (3) their budget/timeline if mentioned, (4) next step agreed. Write in the same language the call was conducted in.
analysisPlan.structuredDataPrompt: Extract: {client_name, business_name, service_interest, budget, timeline, how_heard, callback_time, language_detected}
analysisPlan.successEvaluationPrompt: Did Priya successfully gather the caller's name, service interest, and a callback time? Answer 'true' or 'false'.
